main.title: Middle East Crisis Intensifies as US-Israel Strikes Expand Across Iran
main.summary: The United States and Israel continued large-scale air and missile strikes across Iran, targeting strategic military facilities, causing heavy casualties and prompting widespread retaliation by Iran with ballistic missiles and drones across the region, raising fears of a broader war. International leaders call for restraint amid rising tensions and global economic concerns.

main.title: Iran Vows Revenge After Supreme Leader’s Death, Retaliatory Strikes Spread
main.summary: Iran has vowed sweeping retaliation after the confirmed death of Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei in a joint U.S.–Israeli strike, launching missiles and drones towards Israel and U.S. bases, while explosions are reported across multiple Gulf states.

breaking.title: Iran Retaliates with Missile Attacks Across Middle East
breaking.summary: Iran launched multiple missile and drone attacks on Israeli territory and U.S. military bases following the death of its Supreme Leader in a joint U.S.–Israeli strike.

breaking.title: Airspace Closures Leave Tens of Thousands of Travelers Stranded
breaking.summary: Major Middle Eastern airports and airspace have been closed due to the conflict, causing thousands of flight cancellations and disruptions globally.

nigeria.title: Gunmen Kill at Least 15 in Northern Nigeria Attacks
nigeria.summary: At least 15 people died after coordinated gunmen attacks in three communities in northern Nigeria as insecurity continues to challenge local authorities.

nigeria.title: FIFA Delays Ruling on Nigeria’s World Cup Eligibility Appeal
nigeria.summary: FIFA has yet to rule on Nigeria’s appeal against DR Congo over alleged ineligible players in World Cup qualifiers, leaving Super Eagles fans anxious about future qualification chances.

nigeria.title: Nigeria to Implement Nationwide Airport Cashless Payment System
nigeria.summary: The Federal Airports Authority of Nigeria has introduced a cashless payment system across all major airports to improve transparency and service efficiency.

europe.title: China Condemns US-Israel Attacks on Iran, Calls for Ceasefire Talks
europe.summary: China’s foreign ministry strongly condemned the U.S. and Israeli strikes on Iran as "unacceptable" and urged an immediate ceasefire and diplomatic negotiations to prevent wider conflict.

europe.title: Middle East Airspace Closures Disrupt European Flights
europe.summary: Due to the Middle East conflict, European carriers have canceled or rerouted flights, significantly affecting travel across Europe and beyond.

america.title: US Heightens Military Readiness Amid Middle East Conflict
america.summary: The U.S. military remains on heightened alert following intensified conflict in the Middle East, while political leaders debate defense funding and international response.

america.title: Iran War Escalation Impacts Global Energy Markets
america.summary: The ongoing conflict involving Iran and U.S.-Israeli strikes has triggered concerns about oil price volatility as the Strait of Hormuz remains tense.

africa.title: Union African Leaders Call for Restraint Amid Middle East Turmoil
africa.summary: The African Union has urged dialogue and de-escalation as global tensions rise due to the Middle East conflict, emphasizing diplomatic solutions to prevent ripple effects across regions.

africa.title: Ethiopia and Eritrea Near Renewed Conflict After Drone Strikes
africa.summary: Ethiopia and Eritrea are once again on the brink of war after federal Ethiopian forces used drones against Tigrayan positions, forcing Eritrea to reassess its strategic alliances.

asia.title: Middle East Conflict Spreads to Gulf States
asia.summary: Explosions and missile incidents have been reported in the UAE, Bahrain, Kuwait and Jordan, showing the widening geographic impact of the Middle East conflict.

politics.title: Global Leaders Urge Urgent Ceasefire Talks on Middle East Conflict
politics.summary: Following extensive strikes in Iran and cross-border retaliation, world leaders, including officials from the UN and EU, are calling for immediate diplomatic engagement to avoid further escalation.

business.title: Global Airline Industry Hit as Middle East Airspace Remains Closed
business.summary: Airlines worldwide are struggling with flight cancellations and rerouting due to widespread aviation closures in the Middle East, affecting major carriers and passengers globally.

sport.title: T20 World Cup: South Africa Faces Zimbabwe in Super 8 Clash
sport.summary: South Africa will take on Zimbabwe in a crucial Super 8 match of the ICC T20 World Cup 2026 as both teams seek momentum in the knockout stages.

music.title: Tributes Pour In for Legendary Malian Musician Boncana Maïga
music.summary: Malian composer and cultural icon Boncana Maïga has died at 77, prompting tributes from music lovers and artists across Africa for his contributions to the continent’s sound.

movies.title: African Cinema Spotlight: New Oscar-Buzzworthy Films Emerge
movies.summary: African cinema continues its rise on the global stage with a new slate of films gaining attention at international festivals ahead of awards season.
